# Architecture Overview

## Markdown-first model
Work is described and controlled through Markdown task and verification artifacts.

## Task contract flow
Create a task contract first, define scope and risk, then execute only within that scope.

## Verification report flow
Run checks, record evidence, then summarize result and known gaps in the verification report.

## Human responsibility
Humans decide acceptance, escalation, and any risky action. Automation does not replace human judgment.
